channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Will American companies get tariff refunds after the Supreme Court decision? What we know so far.
item.description: The Supreme Court’s decision striking down most of President Donald Trump’s tariffs left at least one big question unanswered: What about refunds?

item.title: CoreWeave’s stock drops. Why a $4 billion Blue Owl funding snag has investors on edge.
item.description: CoreWeave’s below-investment-grade credit rating has reportedly spooked lenders, raising questions about how the neocloud can maintain its capital-int...

item.title: Nvidia options are priced for a perfect earnings outlook. These are your smarter trades.
item.description: Earnings reports will flood the market next week. Could this be the juice the S&P 500 needs?

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s tariffs. The president is already rolling out new ones.
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court said President Trump exceeded his authority in using a 1977 law to justify a large swath of his tariffs, but that does not mean...

item.title: ‘It’s a life-changing sum’: Can I stop my kids from using their inheritance to support political causes I vehemently oppose?
item.description: ”I would hate for our money to end up in the hands of organizations that oppose everything we have supported throughout our lives.”

item.title: The average tax refund is up 14%. These stocks could see a boost, Bank of America says
item.description: Whether taxpayers are spending or saving their refunds, a slate of stocks could be poised to benefit, the firm said.

item.title: The Dow is just below 50,000. How to trade a move above the key level using options
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average is about 2% off of its all-time highs above 50,000, this options strategy looks to benefit from its next leg up.

item.title: The chart on this generator stock signals more gains ahead, says Carter Worth
item.description: Carter Worth breaks down the technicals on this generator maker.

item.title: Supreme Court says Trump's tariffs aren't legal. These stocks should benefit most
item.description: Home Depot, Nike and Target are a few of the stocks that could rise on the Supreme Court's decision to strike down some of Trump's tariffs, per Wells ...

item.title: This industrial giant is off to the races in 2026 after a strong 2025. Why there's more upside ahead
item.description: Caterpillar's has surged 117% over the past 12 months and is up 34% this year alone.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
